meta.title: An Emerging G2? Prospects for Transatlantic Tech Cooperation
meta.description: On Wednesday, the U.S. and EU will meet at the cabinet-ministerial level to inaugurate the Trade and Technological Council (TTC), the outcome of U.S. President Joe Biden’s recent summit with European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen. What does this herald for transatlantic cooperation on technology? Join Hudson Institute’s Peter Rough for a discussion on this important issue with Hudson Senior Fellows Nadia Schadlow and Tom Duesterberg and head of Technology and Global Affairs at the German Council on Foreign Relations, Tyson Barker.
